results.title: Neymar Cleared to Play as Brazil Prepare for FIFA World Cup 2026 R16 Match Against Norway
results.description: Neymar is fully fit and ready to lead Brazil against Erling Haaland's Norway in a blockbuster FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16 clash. Coach Carlo Ancelotti confirmed the superstar's availability for the match on Sunday, July 5, 2026, at MetLife Stadium, East Rutherford, New Jersey, at 4:00 PM ET. Discover insights into both teams' current form, key player.

results.title: Amazon Prime Day 2026 sale starts in India today: Deals on gadgets you can get delivered in minutes with Amazon Now
results.description: Amazon's Prime Day 2026 sale, running July 4-6, brings exciting deals on gadgets and electronics via its speedy Amazon Now service. Prime members enjoy free delivery, cashback, and up to 70% off accessories. Beyond quick commerce, expect significant discounts across laptops, smart TVs, and Fire TV devices, plus bank offers. This 10th edition also features a reduced annual Prime membership price.

results.title: Samsung Begins One UI 9 Testing Based on Android 17; Check List of Devices
results.description: Samsung is aggressively testing its Android 17-based One UI 9 across a wide array of Galaxy devices, including the popular Galaxy A26 and upcoming foldables, with an official debut rumored for July 22, 2026. This extensive internal testing indicates a rapid rollout of the next-gen UI, bringing new features like advanced AI integration and UI enhancements.
